segments.text_en: Inana adorns herself with the desert crown
evidence: She put the cu-gura, the desert crown, on her head.
her genitals were remarkable
She praised herself, full of delight at her genitals
when she went out to the shepherd, to the sheepfold

segments.text_en: Inana declares her intent to approach Enki
evidence: I shall direct my steps to the abzu, to Eridug
I myself shall speak coaxingly to Enki, in the abzu, in Eridug
I, Inana, personally intend to go to the abzu
I shall utter a plea to the lord Enki
It shall never escape me that I have been neglected by him who has had sex

segments.text_en: Enki foreknows her arrival and orders hospitality
evidence: Enki, the king of the abzu, ... knew all about her enterprise
who knows the divine powers in heaven and earth, who from his own dwelling already knows the intentions of the gods
Come here, my man, listen to my words
Pour beer for her, in front of the Lions Gate
make her feel as if she is in her girlfriend's house

segments.text_en: Isimud welcomes Inana to the banquet
evidence: He let Inana into the abzu and Eridug
she got butter cake to eat
they gave her beer to drink, in front of the Lions Gate
He welcomed holy Inana at the holy table, at the table of An
He made her feel as if she was in her girlfriend's house

segments.text_en: The beer-drinking competition begins
evidence: Enki and Inana were drinking beer together in the abzu
enjoying the taste of sweet wine
the two of them started a competition
drinking from the bronze vessels of Urac

segments.text_en: Enki grants the divine powers to Inana
evidence: I will give them to holy Inana, my daughter
In the name of my power, in the name of my abzu
Holy Inana received heroism, power, wickedness, righteousness
Holy Inana received the craft of the carpenter, the craft of the coppersmith
Holy Inana received wisdom, attentiveness, holy purification rites

segments.text_en: Inana recites the powers she has received
evidence: He has given me righteousness. He has given me the plundering of cities.
He has given me deceit. He has given me the rebel lands.
He has given me the craft of the carpenter.
He has given me wisdom. He has given me attentiveness.
He has given me strife. He has given me triumph. He has given me counselling.

segments.text_en: Enki sobers to find Inana already fled by boat
evidence: can I still reach her?
holy Inana had gathered up the divine powers and embarked onto the Boat of Heaven
The Boat of Heaven had already left the quay
as the effects of the beer cleared from father Enki who had drunk beer
King Enki turned his attention to Eridug

segments.text_en: Enki interrogates Isimud over the missing powers
evidence: Where are the office of en priest, the office of lagal priest, divinity, the great and good crown, the royal throne?
My master has given them to his daughter.
Where are the noble sceptre, the staff and crook, the noble dress, shepherdship, kingship?
Where are the standard, the quiver, sexual intercourse, kissing, prostitution
Where are the holy nijin-jar shrine, ......, the hierodule of heaven, loud musical instruments

segments.text_en: Enki mobilises agents (the frog fragment)
evidence: By the bolt of the temple door, a frog spoke.
Enki grasped the frog by his right paw.
He received ...... the halub tree and his box-tree.
He gave ...... to the bird of heaven.
in the house of Enki should not forget a word

segments.text_en: Pursuit round one: the enkum sent
evidence: The enkum are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
What your father said was very serious. ... His important words cannot be countermanded.
How could my father have changed what he said to me?
he got the enkum to seize hold of the Boat of Heaven
Come, my good minister of E-ana! My fair-spoken minister!

segments.text_en: Pursuit round two: the fifty giants of Eridug
evidence: So Inana got hold again of the divine powers which had been presented to her, and the Boat of Heaven
The fifty giants of Eridug are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
His important words cannot be countermanded.
he got the fifty giants of Eridug to seize hold of the Boat of Heaven
How could he have altered his promise as far as I am concerned?

segments.text_en: Pursuit round three: the fifty lahama
evidence: and then for the third time the prince spoke to his minister Isimud
The fifty lahama of the subterranean waters are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
It has just now reached the UL.MA hill.
he got the fifty lahama of the subterranean waters to seize hold of the Boat of Heaven
Has he sworn falsely by the name of his power and by the name of his abzu?

segments.text_en: Pursuit round four: all the great fish
evidence: and then for the fourth time the prince spoke to his minister Isimud
All the great fish together ...... are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
It has just now reached the Field Hill.
he got all the great fish together ...... to seize hold of the Boat of Heaven
Come, my good minister of E-ana! My fair-spoken minister!

segments.text_en: Pursuit round five: the guardians of Unug
evidence: and then for the fifth time the prince spoke to his minister Isimud
the guardians of Unug, are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
he got the ......, the guardians of Unug, to seize hold of the Boat of Heaven
Was it falsehood that my father said to me, did he speak falsely to me?
Water has never touched your hand, water has never touched your feet!

segments.text_en: Pursuit round six: the Id-surungal
evidence: and then for the sixth time the prince spoke to his minister Isimud
It has just now reached the Id-surungal ......
The Id-surungal ...... are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
he got the Id-surungal ...... to seize hold of the Boat of Heaven
How could he have discredited his important words to me?

segments.text_en: Seventh time: Inana secures the Boat of Heaven
evidence: and then ...... Unug ......
A seventh time ......
The great princely scion, holy ......
Holy Inana ...... the Boat of Heaven.
Holy Inana at that time ......

segments.text_en: Arrival at Unug: rejoicing and proclamation
evidence: today you have brought the Boat of Heaven to the Gate of Joy, to Unug Kulaba
Now there will be rejoicing in our city
It shall pass along the street magnificently. The people shall stand in the street full of awe.
The king shall slaughter bulls, shall sacrifice sheep.
The foreign lands shall declare my greatness. My people shall utter my praise.

segments.text_en: The boat docks and the powers are installed
evidence: it passed magnificently along the street
It reached the maiden's house
the purified well, her principal well
Inana ...... the divine powers which had been presented to her, and the Boat of Heaven, at the Jipar Gate
At the Agrun Chamber ......

segments.text_en: Enki tracks the boat and sends admiration
evidence: Where has the Boat of Heaven reached now?
It has just now reached the White Quay.
Go now, ...... admiration.
Isimud, my minister, my Sweet Name of Heaven!

segments.text_en: Acknowledgment of all the powers Inana brought
evidence: Inana, you have brought with you the office of en priest, ... the royal throne.
You have brought with you the noble sceptre, the staff and crook, the noble dress, shepherdship, kingship.
You have brought with you ... sexual intercourse, ... kissing, ... prostitution
You have brought with you wisdom, ... attentiveness, ... holy purification rites
You have brought with you strife, ... triumph, ... counselling, ... judging, ... decision-making.

segments.text_en: Inana names the places along the route
evidence: she named it with the name "The house Ganzer is rebuilt"
she named that place with the name "Potsherds and scrap metal (?)"
Where the boat came to dock at the quay, she named that place with the name "White Quay"
she named that place with the name "Blue Quay"

segments.text_en: Enki's concession, Inana's query, and final blessing
evidence: In the name of my power, in the name of my abzu, I will establish ...... in my abzu for the woman.
Why has this one now entered here? ...... taking the divine powers from me?
May there be ...... a festival!
May the citizens of your city, Inana, the citizens of Unug, live ......!
as for you, Enki -- may ...... your city, Eridug ......, and has indeed restored ......
